creator: dk_sk@skynet.be
text:
Radeon_RS690_cp_bin.ko module problem in both FreeBSD 13.2 and 14.0 :


the Radeon_RS690_cp_bin.ko firmware module causes screen artifacts , page faults and a kernel core dump, resulting in a frozen system.

Hardware :

-Fujitsu D2703-A as well as D2703-S mainboards

(most likely also every other mainboard with onboard x1250 GPU)

-2GB RAM (D2703-A) , 4GB RAM (D2703-S)

-32GB CF card

-Onboard Radeon X1250 GPU

-no additional hardware present in mainboard PCI slot


System works fine but without acceleration when RS690_cp_bin.ko module is unloaded or removed from /boot/modules directory.
